title: elaphoglossum mickeliorum
intro: Elaphoglossum mickeliorum is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, commonly known as the Mickel's elaphoglossum or Mickel's spike fern. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum mickeliorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tincture or infusion for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
